creator: ebay@looksharp.net
text:
A new port for "vacation", A email vacation / autoresponder, similar to vacation from sendmail.  I (plan to) use this in production at work and am not aware of a suitable replacement already in ports, and I do not want sendmail installed just for this, which has more features anyway. 

This port is fairly simple but it required a few tweaks to deal with the underscore in the distfile, eliminate some hardcoded things in the software's Makefile etc.  I ran it by portlint, there are no fatal errors.  I am willing to make adjustments to suit the preferences of the FreeBSD project and resubmit it.  

SHAR: http://www.egr.msu.edu/~mcdouga9/vacation.sh
